case_title: LAURA ESMERALDA CONTRERAS VS. CAROL BUTTERWORTH et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, LAURA ESMERALDA AS TO DEFENDANT BUTTERWORTH, CAROL BUTTERWORTH, GORDON MASON, SAMI STUART, STEVEN DOES 1 THROUGH 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR OCT-09-2009 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUL-10-2009 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         SEP-24-2009
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION OF WAIVER OF COURT FEES, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, LAURA ESMERALDA HEARING SET FOR JUN-03-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 AS TO PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, LAURA ESMERALDA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-09-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONTRERAS, LAURA ESMERALDA

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-03-2009 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PLAINTIFF LAURA CONTRERAS' WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY ATTY. CHARLES SCHAIBLE FOR PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. AN AMENDED DECLARATION MUST BE FILED IF THE APPLICANT OBTAINS NEW EMPLOYMENT WITHIN 10 COURT DAYS. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY GIVEN TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: KATHERINE FEINSTEIN; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780 (206)
